about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: System Identity Check
about.bio: I'm a full-stack developer with 2+ years of experience building web applications. My journey started with curiosity about how things work on the internet, and it evolved into a passion for crafting exceptional user experiences.
about.bio_highlights: I specialize in React, NextJS, Laravel, Node.js, Flutter and cloud technologies. When I'm not coding, you me find me exploring new frameworks, contributing to open source, or sharing knowledge through technical writing.
about.bio_focus: Currently focused on building AI-powered applications and exploring the intersection of machine learning and web development.
